focus: Pattern expansion — custom fonts, audio mixing, error recovery

key_findings: Agent used local @font-face with downloaded .woff2 — correct approach but had to figure it out from scratch
Skill mentions font auto-resolution and the 'No deterministic font mapping' warning, but has no step-by-step custom font workflow
Agent had to learn: Google Fonts CDN URL pattern, woff2 sourcing, @font-face CSS syntax, assets/fonts/ convention
Font workflow is the single biggest undocumented edge case in the skill
Dual audio (narration + BGM) works correctly — narration at full volume, BGM reduced to 15% via ffmpeg
The skill covers BGM volume reduction in references/background-music.md but the dual-audio pattern isn't documented in the Procedure
Agent had to infer the combination pattern from separate TTS and BGM sections
Lint error `timed_element_missing_clip_class` is caught cleanly with actionable message
Skill's pitfall already documents this well — agent reported it 'directly explained why and what to do'
No structured 'lint → fix → re-lint → render' recovery workflow exists in the skill
Agents handle recovery ad-hoc rather than following a pattern

failure_patterns.pattern: Custom font workflow is completely undocumented. The skill mentions font resolution warnings but no step-by-step for sourcing .woff2, @font-face setup, or assets/fonts/ convention.
failure_patterns.impact: Agents waste time guessing font sourcing approaches or produce renders with wrong fonts.

failure_patterns.pattern: Dual audio (narration + BGM) pattern isn't documented. The skill covers TTS and BGM separately but doesn't show how to combine them with proper volume balancing.
failure_patterns.impact: Agents must infer the combination pattern, risking incorrect volume levels or missing audio elements.

failure_patterns.pattern: No structured lint error recovery workflow exists. Agents handle errors ad-hoc.
failure_patterns.impact: Inefficient debugging — agents may skip the fix → re-lint → verify cycle.

epoch_1_2_effectiveness.template_correction: Not exercised (no agent needed to pick a template for these tasks)
epoch_1_2_effectiveness.render_config_table: Partially exercised — audio mixing agent used --quality draft correctly
